segments.speaker: Classmate
segments.text: Hey, glad you could make it.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks for inviting me. I brought some snacks - nothing fancy, but I didn't want to show up empty-handed.

segments.speaker: Friend
segments.text: I don't think we've met. I'm Daniel.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Nice to meet you. I'm Jongkuk. I just started the architecture PhD program.

segments.speaker: Friend
segments.text: Oh nice. How's Boston treating you so far?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: It's been a lot, but in a good way. I'm still learning basic survival things like groceries and laundry.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I also brought a Korean snack. It's a little spicy, but not dangerous.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Try it and tell me the honest truth.

segments.speaker: Classmate
segments.text: Careful, that's how friendships become real.
